resources.string: Swipe learning, word slots, and correction memory (beta)
Record typing patterns for swipe accuracy and heatmap training
How much recent text is kept for learning (characters)
Learning data stays on this device. Nothing is uploaded or sold. Password fields, private/incognito fields (no-personalized-learning), and email fields are never recorded.
Off: HeliBoard Text correction and autocorrect behave as usual for tapped words. On: Heatmap System-2 may change committed tap words when implemented (learning always on if enabled above).

Off: HeliBoard glide autocorrect unchanged for swiped words. On: Heatmap System-2 may change committed swipe words when implemented. Use tap off + swipe on to learn from taps but only autocorrect swipes.

ON: swipe words from stroke geometry + your dictionaries (no external glide library needed). OFF: use HeliBoard legacy glide if a gesture library is installed. Minimum swipe distance gate is always active.
Disabled while a user-imported libjni_latinime.so is loaded. Remove that library to use Heatmap swipe typing.
When on, keeps timestamped session_export_*.json files (up to 12) on field blur, send, app switch, etc. Latest file always updates on each word commit.
Opens the system file picker (My Files, Downloads, etc.) to save a .json snapshot. Not the share sheet — use this when the phone is tethered to a PC. Type in another app first if empty.
Could not save export. Type a few words with learning on, then try again.
Clears curve/path signature buckets and swipe alignment offsets. Word commits, tap stats, and key bounds are kept.
Deletes stored swipe curve buckets and swipe-only finger-alignment offsets. Your committed-word history and tap learning stay intact.
Clears per-layout key bounds and alignment offsets (tap and swipe). Commits and path buckets are kept.
Deletes stored key bounds and all alignment offsets. The keyboard will re-measure layout geometry on the next commits.
Clears learned letter-confusion and word-correction weights from your autocorrect fixes. Commits and key seen-counts are kept. Common Typo List (Block 6) will use this button too.
Deletes stored letter-confusion pairs and whole-word correction patterns learned from typed≠committed commits. Your word history and tap key stats stay intact.
Typo and correction weights were cleared.
Deletes heatmap database, session exports, and all on-device training counters. Your toggles and slider settings stay as they are. The keyboard must re-learn from your typing.
Are you 100% SURE? This will delete ALL training data, and your keyboard will be reset to a new state. It will have to completely re-train on your typing habits!
All heatmap learning data was deleted.
Could not reset learning data. Try again.
